regional_cost_note: Lower Hutt builders operate on Wellington metro rates — $90–$125/hr labour. Easy access to Wellington suppliers keeps material costs competitive.

businesses.known_for: Quality residential builds from maintenance to new homes, with fixed pricing and no hidden costs.
